title: ADR 013: Observability
jargon: How do I configure telemetry settings in the app.toml file to enable metrics collection?
lay: How can I set up tracking to see how my program is performing?

title: ADR 022: Custom BaseApp panic handling
jargon: How can I implement a custom RecoveryHandler to manage specific errors during the panic recovery process in BaseApp?
lay: How do I set up a way to handle errors when something goes wrong in my app?

title: ADR 024: Coin Metadata
jargon: How does the `x/bank` module handle metadata for different denominations in the Cosmos SDK?
lay: How does the system keep track of different types of money and their names?

title: ADR 057: App Wiring
jargon: What are the key features of the new dependency injection system introduced in the app wiring paradigm?
lay: What new tools are available to help build and connect different parts of the software more easily?

title: ADR Creation Process
jargon: What steps should I follow to initiate the ADR creation process?
lay: How do I start writing a new document to explain a decision we've made?

title: Architecture Decision Records (ADR)
jargon: What is the purpose of an Architectural Decision Record (ADR) in the Cosmos-SDK, and how does it differ from a specification?
lay: What is an ADR and why is it important for keeping track of decisions made in the software project?

title: ADR 3: Dynamic Capability Store
jargon: How does the `CapabilityKeeper` manage the creation and tracking of capability keys during transaction execution in the Cosmos SDK?
lay: How does the system keep track of permissions for different parts of the application while it's running?

title: ADR 006: Secret Store Replacement
jargon: What are the security improvements provided by the new Keyring backend compared to the previous Keybase backend?
lay: How will the new way of storing my information keep it safer than before?

title: ADR 010: Modular AnteHandler
jargon: How can I implement a custom AnteHandler using the ModuleManager to ensure my custom logic is executed in a specific order?
lay: How can I set up my own rules for processing transactions while making sure they run in the order I want?

title: ADR 17: Historical Header Module
jargon: How does the Historical Header Module store and retrieve recent headers in the Cosmos SDK?
lay: How does the system keep track of the latest blocks and make them available for use?

title: ADR 027: Deterministic Protobuf Serialization
jargon: What are the serialization rules for protobuf3 to ensure deterministic output for SignDoc?
lay: How can I make sure that the way I save my data is the same no matter what programming language I use?

title: ADR 029: Fee Grant Module
jargon: What are the different types of fee allowances available in the x/feegrant module, and how do they work?
lay: What kinds of permissions can I give to someone else to pay for my transaction fees, and how do they function?

title: ADR 030: Authorization Module
jargon: How can I use the `authz` module to grant specific permissions to another account for executing messages?
lay: How do I let someone else use my account to do certain things, like send money or vote?

title: ADR 041: In-Place Store Migrations
jargon: How do I register migration functions for my module when performing in-place store migrations?
lay: How can I set up the steps to update my software without having to export and import a big JSON file?

title: ADR 045: BaseApp `{Check,Deliver}Tx` as Middlewares
jargon: How can I implement a custom middleware for the BaseApp's transaction handling using the new middleware design?
lay: How do I create my own piece of code that can work with transactions in this software?

title: ADR 049: State Sync Hooks
jargon: How can I implement a new ExtensionSnapshotter to include additional state in the state sync process?
lay: What do I need to do to add extra data to the snapshots when syncing my application?

title: ADR 050: SIGN_MODE_TEXTUAL: Annex 2 XXX
jargon: What are the guidelines for rendering a SIGN_MODE_TEXTUAL document on a hardware security device?
lay: How should a device show a signed document so that it's easy to read?

title: ADR 053: Go Module Refactoring
jargon: What are the guidelines for creating new go modules from the existing SDK?
lay: How do I break down the current SDK into smaller parts?

title: ADR 058: Auto-Generated CLI
jargon: How can I leverage the new infrastructure in `client/v2` to automatically generate CLI commands for my Cosmos SDK module based on protobuf definitions?
lay: How can I use the new tools to create command line instructions for my software without having to write them by hand?

title: ADR-061: Liquid Staking
jargon: How does the exemption factor impact the issuance of tokenized shares in the liquid staking system?
lay: What does the exemption factor do for the way I can use my staked tokens?
